title: Add default CNI configuration
body:
podman needs a pair of configuration files to set up its default
network configuration: a bridge and loopback file.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude I think you forgot to check in the new CNI configs
@rhatdan should be good to go now
@rhatdan ok, back to installing into TESTDIR, ready for merge

:pushpin: Commit 724f0b3 has been approved by `baude`
